description_long: This object is a stylized, cartoonish mortar launcher with a large, cylindrical black barrel mounted on a round, multi-layered base. The barrel is angled upward and supported by two brown, angular braces on either side. At the rear of the base, there is a control panel featuring a green, cat-faced display with purple ears and pink buttons, adding a whimsical touch. The base is predominantly black with some gray and brown accents, and the control panel includes small red and purple components. The overall design is compact and robust, suggesting it is intended for stationary use in an urban environment. The object appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some plastic and electronic elements in the control panel.
description: A stylized mortar launcher with a large black barrel, brown supports, and a whimsical cat-faced control panel on a round base.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, open barrel and the circular base with brown supports visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled barrel, brown supports, and the protruding control panel with colored buttons.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cat-faced control panel, purple ears, and the symmetrical brown supports flanking the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled barrel, brown supports, and the side profile of the control panel.
